description: Bears environment machine status and command logs

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, 'First Status: ' || status AS "first" FROM (SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'first' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 150) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "first" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'first' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'first' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'first' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 300) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, 'Biologic Status: ' || status AS "biologic" FROM (SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'biologic' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 150) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "biologic" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'biologic' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'biologic' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'biologic' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 300) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, 'Opentrons Status: ' || status AS "opentrons" FROM (SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'opentrons' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 150) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "opentrons" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'opentrons' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'opentrons' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'opentrons' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 300) ORDER BY time ASC

options.content:
{{agent_id}}
{{agent_id}} {{event}} {{time}}
{{message}}
options.defaultContent: No chat turns in the selected time range.
options.styles: [data-panelid="161"] .panel-container,[data-panelid="162"] .panel-container{border:1px solid #fff!important;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px #fff!important;border-radius:6px!important}.puda-chat-card{display:flex;gap:12px;margin:0 0 14px 0;font-family:Inter,Arial,sans-serif;color:#f5f5f5}.puda-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;min-width:40px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;color:#050505;background:#dfff69;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(223,255,105,.24)}.puda-chat-main{min-width:0;flex:1}.puda-chat-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:0 0 7px 0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.puda-speaker{font-weight:800;color:#dfff69}.puda-pill{border:1px solid rgba(223,255,105,.7);color:#dfff69;border-radius:999px;padding:2px 9px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.04em}.puda-time{font-size:12px;color:#d6d6d6}.puda-bubble{position:relative;background:#f3f3ef;color:#151515;border:2px solid #dfff69;border-left-width:5px;border-radius:0 20px 20px 20px;padding:16px;line-height:1.55;font-size:15px}.puda-bubble-text{max-height:156px;overflow:hidden;white-space:pre-wrap;padding-right:92px}.puda-bubble.puda-expanded .puda-bubble-text{max-height:none;overflow:visible}.puda-show-more{position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;border:1px solid rgba(21,21,21,.35);border-radius:999px;background:#151515;color:#fff;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}.puda-bubble.puda-expanded .puda-show-more{background:#dfff69;color:#151515}.puda-bubble:not(.puda-overflowing) .puda-show-more{display:none}.puda-prompt{margin-top:8px;color:#aeb4bf;font-size:12px;line-height:1.35;max-height:42px;overflow:hidden}.markdown-html{background:#050505;border:1px solid #fff;border-radius:24px;padding:14px 16px;max-height:100%;overflow:auto}

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agent_id, event, COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(assistant_response AS VARCHAR), ''), NULLIF(CAST(user_message AS VARCHAR), ''), '') AS message FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 32

options.defaultContent: No tool/action calls in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agent_id, event, COALESCE(tool_name, 'tool') AS tool_name, COALESCE(status, '') AS status, COALESCE(CAST(duration_ms AS VARCHAR), 'pending') AS duration_ms, COALESCE(error_message, 'Tool/action requested by the agent.') AS error_message, COALESCE(substr(CAST(args AS VARCHAR), 1, 700), '{}') AS args FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 48
SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Commands Sent" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'command' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant')
SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Responses" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'response' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant')

SELECT now() AS time, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS "Success Rate" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'response' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant')
SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Errors" FROM machine_commands WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant')

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'first' THEN 1 END) AS "first", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'biologic' THEN 1 END) AS "biologic", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'opentrons' THEN 1 END) AS "opentrons", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'elephant' THEN 1 END) AS "elephant" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'command' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Errors" FROM machine_commands WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN agent_id = 'first' THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) AS "first", SUM(CASE WHEN agent_id = 'biologic' THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) AS "biologic", SUM(CASE WHEN agent_id = 'opentrons' THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) AS "opentrons", SUM(CASE WHEN agent_id = 'elephant' THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) AS "elephant" FROM hermes_api_request WHERE event = 'api_end' AND total_tokens IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) AND agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT time, agent_id, source, event, message FROM (SELECT time, agent_id, 'Session' AS source, event, '' AS message FROM hermes_session WHERE agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, agent_id, 'LLM Turn' AS source, event, COALESCE(NULLIF(substr(CAST(assistant_response AS VARCHAR), 1, 500), ''), NULLIF(substr(CAST(user_message AS VARCHAR), 1, 500), ''), '') AS message FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, agent_id, 'API Request' AS source, event, COALESCE(model, '') AS message FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT time, agent_id, event, COALESCE(tool_name, 'tool') AS tool_name, COALESCE(status, '') AS status, duration_ms, COALESCE(error_message, '') AS message, COALESCE(substr(CAST(args AS VARCHAR), 1, 700), '{}') AS args FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT time, machine_id, msg_type, COALESCE(cmd_name, '') AS command, status, COALESCE(CAST(step_number AS VARCHAR), '') AS step, username, COALESCE(run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(substr(response_message, 1, 300), '') AS message, COALESCE(substr(params_json, 1, 300), '') AS params, COALESCE(substr(data_json, 1, 1000), '') AS response FROM machine_commands WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('first', 'biologic', 'opentrons', 'elephant') ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

title: Bears
